pages.text: Everyone knows that Khuzwayo loves to dance. When the village leader chooses him to be the next Ingoma dancer, no one is surprised.

blocks.text: Everyone knows that Khuzwayo loves to dance. When the village leader chooses him to be the next Ingoma dancer, no one is surprised.

pages.text: Ingoma is a dance to celebrate the first crops at the beginning of the year. Khuzwayo’s family is proud.

blocks.text: Ingoma is a dance to celebrate the first crops at the beginning of the year. Khuzwayo’s family is proud.

pages.text: But Khuzwayo is worried. How will he dance in front of so many people from so many villages? He normally only performs for a few neighbours.

blocks.text: How will he dance in front of so many people from so many villages? He normally only performs for a few neighbours.

pages.text: “I can’t do it! It’s too scary.” He runs away ...

blocks.text: “I can’t do it! It’s too scary.”

pages.text: Everyone wonders where he is. No one can find him. But Khuzwayo’s best friends know exactly where he would be!

blocks.text: Everyone wonders where he is. No one can find him. But Khuzwayo’s best friends know exactly where he would be!

pages.text: “I am nervous. What if I make a mistake?”

blocks.text: “I am nervous. What if I make a mistake?”

pages.text: “We can help you. Let’s all practise together!” “Khuzwayo, you’re so good. You’re ready to dance with the older dancers!”

blocks.text: “We can help you. Let’s all practise together!”
“Khuzwayo, you’re so good. You’re ready to dance with the older dancers!”

pages.text: On the day of the Ingoma dance Khuzwayo leads his village to the arena wearing a special outfit. He still feels a little nervous, but the rattles on his feet guide him.

blocks.text: On the day of the Ingoma dance Khuzwayo leads his village to the arena wearing a special outfit.
He still feels a little nervous, but the rattles on his feet guide him.

pages.text: He stomps his legs. He waves his arms. Everyone loves Khuzwayo’s dance!

blocks.text: He stomps his legs. He waves his arms. Everyone loves Khuzwayo’s dance!
